name: Cash Inflow
description: Incoming cash movement such as a deposit or credit into an account.

name: Cash Outflow
description: Outgoing cash movement such as a withdrawal, payment, or debit from an account.

name: Equity Purchase
description: Purchase of an equity security or related investment instrument.

name: Equity Sale
description: Sale of an equity security or related investment instrument.

name: Dividend Income
description: Dividend cash flow received from an investment holding.

name: Interest Income
description: Interest credited from a cash balance, bond, or other interest-bearing instrument.

name: Management Fee
description: Account-level advisory, custody, or management-related fee charge.

name: Tax Adjustment
description: Tax withholding, tax payment, or tax-related adjustment linked to a transaction.

name: Internal Transfer
description: Transfer of cash between internal accounts or ledgers.

name: Ignore / Non-actionable
description: Non-trade, bookkeeping, or otherwise non-actionable transaction.
